publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-04-21 18:33:11 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Correspondence, Memorabilia, Movie Film, Newspapers, Photographs, Printed Materials.
did.abstract: Papers of Dr. Joyce Brothers include correspondence, subject files, letters received, scripts, clippings, contracts, awards, photographs, cartoons, slides, and articles and books by Dr. Brothers. Audiovisual Archives of Dr. Joyce Brothers include 463 motion picture films, ca. 796 video tapes, and 184 audio recordings.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Cornell University Class of 1947, Columbia University Ph.D. 1955.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Papers of Dr. Joyce Brothers include correspondence, subject files, letters received, scripts, clippings, contracts, awards, photographs, cartoons, slides, and articles and books by Dr. Brothers. Audiovisual Archives of Dr. Joyce Brothers include 463 motion picture films, ca. 796 video tapes, and 184 audio recordings.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Dr. Joyce Brothers papers, #4254. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Consult Dr. Brothers changed titles and is also referred to as "The Dr. Joyce Brothers Show" or "The Dr. Joyce Brothers Program" in the early years. It is unclear when exactly the name changed, but was clearly Consult Dr. Brothers in 1961. Documents that were not labelled with the show title were labelled as "Consult Dr. Brothers" for consistency. The show was picked up by NBC and later ABC (1961). It ran from 1959 to circa 1961 and preceded "Tell Me, Dr. Brothers". 65 episodes. In 1961, letters say "ready to shoot" 1-28, so maybe Dr. JB Show was pre-61, and Consult started with ABC in 1961? but referred to in publicity pamphlets in 1962 as "The Dr. Joyce Brothers show"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These notes likely relate to Consult Dr. Brothers, as they were found with related material, but may also contain information on "Tell Me, Dr. Brothers." Included are notes for redaction and censorship for the show from WEWS.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These notes likely relate to Consult Dr. Brothers, as they were found with related material, but may also contain information on "Tell Me, Dr. Brothers."

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes publicity and publicity booklet from ABC Films.

did.unittitle: Meet Dr. Brothers publicity for "Dr. Joyce Brothers," WRCA-TV

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These are likely from Consult Dr. Brothers, in a folder labelled "Toronto A's"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Duplicate of the promos on V-12617, for channels 2-12, and general promo, filmed on March 25 ,1961. Followed by 30 minutes of blank tape, then 10 second promos for channels 2-12, and general promo. These promos were filmed on March 24, 1961.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes commercials. Topics: my second wife resents things I did with my first wife; husband critical of wife's shopping.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Topics include: Is abortion the way out of a dilemma?; when is it right for a young girl to kiss a boy?; second marriages; 4-year-old interested in sex.
